entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A stress-resilient crop from which the PgHsp10 promoter was derived

entities.name: PGHSP10
entities.description: Heat shock protein 10 gene in pearl millet

entities.name: PGHSP10 PROMOTER
entities.description: The promoter region of the PgHsp10 gene, including variants PgHsp10PC, PgHsp10D1, PgHsp10D2, and PgHsp10AS

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that induce stress in plants

entities.name: TOBACCO
entities.description: The heterologous plant system used for testing the PgHsp10 promoter

entities.name: CIS-MOTIFS
entities.description: DNA sequences within the promoter required for tissue and abiotic stress inducibility

entities.name: GATEWAY CLONING
entities.description: A molecular cloning method used to insert promoter constructs into the expression vector

entities.name: PMDC164
entities.description: A plant expression vector used to carry the PgHsp10 promoter constructs

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM-MEDIATED GENETIC TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: A method used to transform the promoter constructs into tobacco plants

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM
entities.description: The bacterium used as a vehicle for genetic transformation

entities.name: PCR
entities.description: Polymerase Chain Reaction used to confirm the presence of the transgene in tobacco plants

entities.name: GUS HISTOCHEMICAL ASSAY
entities.description: A method used to visualize the spatial activity of the promoter in plant tissues

entities.name: QRT-PCR
entities.description: Quantitative reverse transcription PCR used to measure the expression levels of the promoter

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: A specific abiotic stress that strongly induces the activity of the PgHsp10 promoter

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A specific abiotic stress for which the PgHsp10 promoter is a potential candidate for developing tolerance

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand high temperature stress

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand water scarcity stress

entities.name: STEM
entities.description: Plant tissue where PgHsp10 promoter expression was specific under control conditions

entities.name: SEEDLINGS
entities.description: Plant stage/tissue where PgHsp10 promoter expression was specific under control conditions
